## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Siit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Matt Alves-Hill introduced as new managing editor, replacing Jess](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Focus on fixing alternative tool pages and generating missing cons lists (21 total) before publishing new content](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Shift priority to cleaning up and expanding tools pages over editorial content for the next 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Reddit seeding strategy showing positive early results for organic rankings and trial signups](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)

## Topics

### Team Changes and Introductions

  - [Matt Alves-Hill introduced as new managing editor, replacing Jess](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Sarah transitioning to R-Strategy Sprint team, new content manager starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Matt brings experience with Atlas and new agentic workflows](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)

### Performance Update

  - [Google Search Console showing positive "hockey stick" growth in traffic and impressions over past 16 months](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)

### Alternative Tool Pages Cleanup

  - [21 missing cons lists identified across alternative pages](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Plan to pause new publishing for \~1 week to generate cons and fix alternative pages](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [Matt to create SOP for publishers to prevent future issues](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)

### DevOps Tool Pages

  - [Carmel shared spreadsheet of DevOps categories for future tool pages](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [Opportunity to expand into DevOps audience, seeing head of DevOps starting trials](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)

### Editorial Content Planning

  - [Pausing editorial content for \~3 weeks to focus on tool page cleanup](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Will resume publishing editorials week of October 13th](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [Team to review and potentially refine editorial strategy for more cohesive long-term vision](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

### Reddit Seeding Strategy

  - [Working with agency Tactical for seeded Reddit posts and comments](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Early positive results: organic ranking for "JIRA migration" and trials attributed to Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [Team interested in list of posts for potential content expansion and pain point analysis](https://fathom.video/share/zHysFyvSp8LTCpP1wyiNj1kMWbbz6inU?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
